title: rondeletia larensis
intro: Rondeletia larensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Caribbean. It is also known as Laren's Rondeletia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. Rondeletia larensis is used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, which are said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health.
